data.body:
Bug-sweep session (worktree bug-sweep @ origin/main 67372d018). TASK: remove jira-reb-695 + root-cause its non-cleanup; /joe-debug all other open bugs, land each via Gerrit; parallel investigations (flaky tests, GH Actions, AWS) -> create bugs and add to joe-debug.

FINDINGS: GH Actions -> Jira reconciler HEALTHY. P1 luxe-adder-faith(aa7b) is FALSE/STUCK: reconcile-bridge-canary.yml installs plain rebar (no [agents]) then closes alert on recovery, tripping require_completion_verification_for_close (fail-closed) under set -e -> canary red + ticket stuck. Root cause of P1 + canary bug; fix=--force-close on the 2 auto-close steps. jira-reb-714 ALREADY FIXED (commit 440095133 GH_REPO; v0.7.1 green) -> verify+close. NEW flaky test test_format_via_symlink_tracker[auto] (assert 35<=32). AWS: bridge not on AWS (GH Actions); frontier account login expired -> BLOCKED, no observable AWS rebar errors.

JOE-DEBUG SET: luxe-adder-faith(P1), saggy-pupil-plant f193(store corruption), vocal-dip-robin edf7(flaky git-race), slum-shoal-gully cc7f(session-log rotation), jira-reb-714(release,likely-fixed) + NEW canary bug + NEW flaky test + pending flaky subagent.
